sql_array: CREATE TABLE fuzz_test (id UInt32, value String, created_at DateTime) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT id, toDecimal256OrZero(value, 38) AS decimal_value FROM fuzz_test WHERE toDecimal256OrZero(value, 38) = ALL (SELECT toDecimal256OrZero(value, 38) FROM fuzz_test WHERE id > 1);
SELECT id, toDecimal256OrZero(value, 38) AS decimal_value FROM fuzz_test WHERE toDecimal256OrZero(value, 38) IN (SELECT toDecimal256OrZero(value, 38) FROM fuzz_test WHERE id = 1 OR value = 'NaN');

SELECT id, value, toDecimal256OrZero(value, 20) AS decimal_value, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY toDecimal256OrZero(value, 20)) AS value_count FROM fuzz_test HAVING decimal_value = ALL (SELECT toDecimal256OrZero('0.0001', 20));
CREATE TABLE fuzz_test_joins (id UInt32, reference_value String) ENGINE = Memory;

SELECT a.id, a.value, toDecimal256OrZero(a.value, 38) AS decimal_value FROM fuzz_test a JOIN fuzz_test_joins b ON toDecimal256OrZero(a.value, 38) = ALL (SELECT toDecimal256OrZero(reference_value, 38) FROM fuzz_test_joins);
SELECT value, toDecimal256OrZero(value, 38) AS decimal_value FROM fuzz_test GROUP BY decimal_value HAVING decimal_value > 0;
SELECT AVG(toDecimal256OrZero(value, 20)) AS avg_value FROM fuzz_test HAVING avg_value = ALL (SELECT SUM(toDecimal256OrZero(value, 20)) FROM fuzz_test WHERE id < 4);
